geetest_email_verify_desc: Please complete this security check before we send the verification code.
home_open_via_discord: Open via Discord to get started
missing_oauth_params: Missing OAuth parameters. Please try again.
select_platform_desc: Choose the platform you want to add an account for
add_account_desc: Connect your game accounts to start experiencing an elevated HoYoverse experience.
select_platform_security_note: We take your account security seriously.
login_method_faq_note: Not sure which method to use?
select_login_method_desc: Choose how you'd like to authenticate

email.label: Email & Password
email.desc: Sign in with your email or username and password

devtools.label: DevTools
devtools.desc: Extract cookies from browser developer tools

email_login_desc: Sign in with your HoYoverse account email or username and password
email_login_panel_desc: Sign in securely with your HoYoverse account. You can use either your email address or username.
email_login_no_account: I don't have a HoYoverse account (login with Google, Facebook)
devtools_desc: Follow the steps below to extract your session cookies from your browser's developer tools.
devtools_panel_desc: Extract your session cookies directly from your browser's developer tools.
devtools_step1_desc: Open your browser and navigate to one of the following platforms:
devtools_step2_desc: Press F12 or Ctrl+Shift+I to open your browser's developer tools.
devtools_step3_desc: Click on the "Application" tab in the developer tools panel.
devtools_step4_desc: Click on "Cookies" in the left panel, then click on the current website (e.g. www.hoyolab.com).
devtools_step5_desc: Use the search box to filter "v2" to narrow down the relevant cookies.
devtools_step6_desc: Copy the value of each cookie and paste it into the corresponding field below.
devtools_modal_desc: Copy each value from the DevTools Application → Cookies panel and paste below.
email_verify_desc: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email address
email_login_security_note: Your email and password are never stored on our servers.
code_expires_note: Check your inbox - the code expires in a few minutes
select_accounts_desc: Choose which game accounts to add to Hoyo Buddy. All accounts are selected by default.
not_found_desc: This page doesn't exist or may have been moved. Head back home to get started.
geetest_command_desc: Please complete the security check to continue.
geetest_command_success_desc: You can now return to Discord.
complete_desc: Your accounts have been added to Hoyo Buddy. You can now return to Discord.
